dialogueLines.text: You give flowers to our friends yet?
Good. I know they appreciate them.
So you just got them for yourself? What's up with you?
Oh! I almost forgot. Here, I found this in front of your door.
...I'm sorry, I was trying to not bring it up, but I still can't believe Penelope's gone.
I tried warning her about going out that night. She didn't listen, but I still can't help but feel that it's my fault.

choices.text: Irene, you can't blame yourself for what happened.
If you were so worried, why didn't you go?

dialogueLines.text: I know, I know. It's just hard...but thanks, Echo.
I ask myself that every day, Echo. If you hate being here with me so much, why'd you even come?
Sorry. It's just that...I would do anything to change what happened.
Oh man, it's getting late. I've gotta head back. I told Stevie I'd fix the gravestones that are tilting, would you be a doll and do it for me?.
Also, Stevie said he has something to give you, so go see him after you're done here.
Thanks for coming, Echo. See you tomorrow.
